Id1.text: Auburn is part of King County, Washington in the United States, the capital of which is Washington DC.

Id2.text: Auburn is part of King County, Washington in the U.S. The capital of the U.S. is Washington, D.C.

Id3.text: The capital of the U.S. is Washington D.C. and King County which is in Washington is the location of Auburn, Washington.
